---
title: "Model Performance"
---

## Observed vs Predicted

Predicted SSC plotted against observed values across all holdout readings on a log-log scale. Points near the 1:1 line indicate accurate predictions. The 2x envelope (dashed) shows factor-of-two accuracy.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-obs-pred
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")
from _scripts.figures import make_obs_vs_pred

fig = make_obs_vs_pred(Path("dashboard_data/per_reading.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## SSC Distribution: Observed vs Predicted

Do the observed and predicted SSC values span the same concentration range with the same shape? Mismatches reveal systematic bias.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-distribution-comparison
from _scripts.figures import make_distribution_comparison

fig = make_distribution_comparison(Path("dashboard_data/per_reading.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## Pooled vs. Site-Level Performance

Pooled metrics can mask poor performance at individual sites. This shows the distribution of per-site R2 values — note how many sites fall below zero.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-pooled-vs-persite
from _scripts.figures import make_pooled_vs_persite

fig = make_pooled_vs_persite(Path("dashboard_data/per_site.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## CatBoost vs OLS Head-to-Head

Each point is one holdout site at N=10 calibration samples (random split). Points above the diagonal: CatBoost outperforms OLS. Points below: OLS wins.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-catboost-vs-ols
from _scripts.figures import make_catboost_vs_ols

fig = make_catboost_vs_ols(Path("dashboard_data/ols_ols_benchmark_per_site.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## Disaggregated Performance

Model performance broken down by hydrology regime, collection method, geology, and SSC range. Two views of the same data — heatmap and dot plot — for comparison.

### Heatmap View

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-disagg-heatmap
from _scripts.figures import make_disaggregated_heatmap

fig = make_disaggregated_heatmap(Path("dashboard_data/diag_disaggregated_metrics.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

### Dot Plot View

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-disagg-dotplot
from _scripts.figures import make_disaggregated_dotplot

fig = make_disaggregated_dotplot(Path("dashboard_data/diag_disaggregated_metrics.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## Error Landscape

Every prediction plotted by observed SSC concentration. Annotated zones show the physical mechanisms driving model error at different concentration ranges.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-physics-wall
from _scripts.figures import make_physics_wall

fig = make_physics_wall(Path("dashboard_data/per_reading.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

## Geology Disaggregation

### Grouped Bar View

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-geology-disagg
from _scripts.figures import make_geology_disaggregation

fig = make_geology_disaggregation(Path("dashboard_data/diag_disaggregated_metrics.parquet"))
fig.show()
```

### Slope Graph View

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-geology-slopegraph
from _scripts.figures import make_geology_slopegraph

fig = make_geology_slopegraph(Path("dashboard_data/diag_disaggregated_metrics.parquet"))
fig.show()
```
